description: Lotte Homeshopping (Lotte iMall) is a Korean multichannel home shopping platform that combines TV home shopping, live commerce, and mobile/web storefronts. It publishes public product, schedule, search, and policy pages for shoppers.
summary: lotteimall.com exposes public shopping web pages on m.lotteimall.com; no developer API, GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI documentation was found.
